title: LSP Explorer
description: Navigate a TypeScript codebase using LSP features
tasks: Place cursor on the Day interface name
Find all references (gr) — note how many files use it
Go to one of the references (Enter on a result)
Hover the type to see its definition (K)
Go back to the definition (gd on the type name)
Rename the interface from Day to CourseDay (<leader>cr)
Undo the rename (u) to keep the original name
hints: gd takes you to where something is defined
gr shows you everywhere it's used

title: Register Gymnastics
description: Use named registers to juggle multiple pieces of text
hints: Replace each placeholder: ciw then Ctrl-r a (or "ap after positioning)

title: Macro Machine
description: Record and replay a macro to transform repetitive data
startingCode:
name,email,role
Alex,alex@example.com,admin
Marco,marco@example.com,editor
Lucia,lucia@example.com,viewer
Giulia,giulia@example.com,admin
Paolo,paolo@example.com,editor
Sara,sara@example.com,viewer
Luca,luca@example.com,admin
Elena,elena@example.com,editor
expectedCode:
name,email,role
{ name: "Alex", email: "alex@example.com", role: "admin" },
{ name: "Marco", email: "marco@example.com", role: "editor" },
{ name: "Lucia", email: "lucia@example.com", role: "viewer" },
{ name: "Giulia", email: "giulia@example.com", role: "admin" },
{ name: "Paolo", email: "paolo@example.com", role: "editor" },
{ name: "Sara", email: "sara@example.com", role: "viewer" },
{ name: "Luca", email: "luca@example.com", role: "admin" },
{ name: "Elena", email: "elena@example.com", role: "editor" },
hints: Go to line 2, record a macro: qa
Transform one CSV line to an object literal

title: The Refactoring
description: Complete a multi-step refactoring using LSP, diagnostics, formatting, and git
tasks: Navigate to each error with ]d and fix it
hints: This tests the full refactoring workflow
Use ]d to jump between errors quickly
Stage individual hunks instead of entire files for clean commits
